summary: Successfully verified Select dropdown bug fix from iteration 1. Backend APIs working excellently (93.9% success rate). Main Select component issues have been resolved - forms now display dropdown options correctly. However, discovered a modal overlay issue preventing form submissions.

minor_issues.issue: Some cleanup operations fail due to cascading deletes

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts pointer events preventing form submissions and navigation
affected_pages: All form dialogs - Animais, Movimentações, Eventos, Despesas

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete form submissions due to modal overlay blocking interactions
affected_selectors: Navigation links when dialog is open

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (31/33 tests passed - 93.9% success rate)
Select dropdown components now working correctly
Animal type dropdown displays all options (Bovino, Suíno, Ovino, etc.)
Movement form animal select shows 'Nenhum' option (value='none' fix confirmed)
Report generation UI (PDF and Excel buttons)
No JavaScript errors related to SelectItem components

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Select dropdown bug fixed, but modal overlay prevents form submissions

action_item_for_main_agent: HIGH PRIORITY: Fix modal dialog overlay issue. The DialogOverlay component with 'fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/80' is intercepting pointer events and preventing form submissions and navigation when dialogs are open. This blocks all CRUD operations despite the Select dropdown components now working correctly. The Select dropdown bug from iteration 1 has been successfully resolved.
